title: AN ACT relating to public notices.
subject: Advertising
Cities
Counties
Education, Elementary and Secondary
Local Government
News Media
Notices
Publications
Special Districts
Special Purpose Governmental Entities

abstracts.abstract: Amend KRS 424.260 to make a technical correction and to increase the expenditure threshold for the advertising requirement from $40,000 to $60,000; exempt vehicles and installed vehicle equipment from the bidding requirement; allow an alternative publication procedure for the advertisement; amend KRS 424.145 to remove the population restriction and allow any city, special district, school district, or special purpose governmental entity to use the alternative publication procedures.
